title: 4 Pack Metallic Sewing Thread Set, metallic embroidery thread,Shiny Gold Thread and Silvery Threads for Embroidery and Patchwork, Universal Sewing Machine Threads for Quilting, Hand Machine Decorative
features: Metallic Embroidery Thread Set: You will receive 4 pcs metallic sewing thread,each spool with 200 yards of thread, 2 gold thread 2 silver thread.Making them easy to handle, store, and add to your collection of sewing machine accessories.
Classic Silver & Gold Embroidery Thread Combination: The timeless pairing of golden thread andsilvery thread makes this set versatile for embroidery, patchwork, and garmentaccents.

Silver & Gold Thread for Crafting: Made from polyester material that is less prone to breakage, this thread is strong and smooth, providing a seamless sewing experience. It easily passes through fabric, reducing the chance of tangling or breakage during the process.

Smooth and User-Friendly: Designed for ease of use, these spools work well with sewing thread for sewing machine, hand sewing machine, and as overlocker thread, helping stitches glide evenly.Handling this thread is a breeze, as it slides smoothly through fabric. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced , sewing becomes effortless with this thread.

Wide Application: Just use scissors to cut the required length, and you can try to make some exquisite gifts for friends or family for the upcoming holidays, or you can make decorations for birthdays, Thanksgiving, New Year and other occasions, and give full play to your DIY creative ability.
